title: Gemini-SQL2：基于Gemini 3.1 Pro的Text-to-SQL新SOTA，BIRD基准上表现强劲
full_text:
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
elvis
@omarsar0
Text-to-SQL might sound like a solved problem.
Far from it. Data gets messy and complex really fast in the real world. Strong reasoning models are great, but nothing beats a custom model at this stuff. Gemini-SQL2 looks very strong here. BIRD is a tough benchmark. I suspect there are plenty of opportunities like this in KBs, search, graph databases, etc.
Google Research
@GoogleResearch
12h
🚀 Introducing Gemini-SQL2, our breakthrough text-to-SQL capability powered by Gemini 3.1 Pro! We've achieved state-of-the-art results on the highly competitive BIRD benchmark, translating natural language into execution-ready SQL queries. 🧵👇
8:21 PM · Jun 12, 2026 17K Views

discovery_record.discovery_title: Gemini-SQL2：基于Gemini 3.1 Pro的Text-to-SQL新SOTA，BIRD基准上表现强劲
discovery_record.discovery_summary: GoogleResearch推出Gemini-SQL2，基于Gemini 3.1 Pro，在BIRD benchmark上达到Text-to-SQL的SOTA结果，能将自然语言翻译为可直接执行的SQL查询。DAIR.AI的Elvis Saravia指出，现实世界数据复杂混乱，尽管强推理模型表现不错，但定制模型（如Gemini-SQL2）在此类任务上更胜一筹。他认为在知识库、搜索、图数据库等领域也存在类似机会，BIRD是一个非常具有挑战性的基准。

key_excerpts.text: GoogleResearch推出Gemini-SQL2，基于Gemini 3.1 Pro，在BIRD benchmark上达到Text-to-SQL的SOTA结果，能将自然语言翻译为可直接执行的SQL查询。DAIR.AI的Elvis Saravia指出，现实世界数据复杂混乱，尽管强推理模型表现不错，但定制模型（如Gemini-SQL2）在此类任务上更胜一筹。他认为在知识库、搜索、图数据库等领域也存在类似机会，BIRD是一个非常具有挑战性的基准。

Data gets messy and complex really fast in the real world.
Strong reasoning models are great, but nothing beats a custom model at this stuff.

## key_excerpts

1. [product_update / daily_observation, heatmap, change / high] GoogleResearch推出Gemini-SQL2，基于Gemini 3.1 Pro，在BIRD benchmark上达到Text-to-SQL的SOTA结果，能将自然语言翻译为可直接执行的SQL查询。DAIR.AI的Elvis Saravia指出，现实世界数据复杂混乱，尽管强推理模型表现不错，但定制模型（如Gemini-SQL2）在此类任务上更胜一筹。他认为在知识库、搜索、图数据库等领域也存在类似机会，BIRD是一个非常具有挑战性的基准。

5. [company_action / daily_observation, heatmap, change, case, trend / high] Gemini-SQL2 looks very strong here.
